purpose: Phase 9 Content Distribution Engine for Matrix Reprogrammed. This data turns archive material into reusable video, podcast, article, newsletter, and short-form briefing routes.
rules: One archive source should become multiple distribution formats.
Every format must preserve evidence boundaries.
No clip should turn association into accusation.
Short-form hooks must route back to source pages, books, maps, answers, or the Trust Center.
Every script must include a source-bound next step.
Distribution pages must support human readers and AI crawlers.

formats.title: Short-Form Signal Scripts
formats.label: 60-second video / reels / shorts
formats.summary: Fast source-bound scripts that open with a hard question, define the evidence label, and route viewers into the archive.

sampleBriefs.title: Documented Association Is Not Guilt
sampleBriefs.hook: A name in a file is not a conviction. Here is how the archive separates contact from guilt.

sampleBriefs.title: What Was MKUltra?
sampleBriefs.hook: This is not folklore. MKUltra is a documented intelligence history — but that does not prove every modern claim attached to it.

sampleBriefs.title: How Power Maps Lie
sampleBriefs.hook: A line without a label is propaganda. A line with a source boundary becomes intelligence.

formats.title: Longform Dossier Videos
formats.label: 8-20 minute video essays
formats.summary: Longer cinematic explainer structures for deep topics: intelligence, crime-state overlap, war machinery, elite access, symbols, medical power, and evidence boundaries.

sampleBriefs.title: The War Machine Map
sampleBriefs.hook: Follow the public-record route from war budgets to contractors, intelligence claims, procurement, and human cost.

sampleBriefs.title: The Crime-State Overlap
sampleBriefs.hook: Organized crime is not just violence. It is logistics, ports, finance, corruption, and court records.

sampleBriefs.title: The Intelligence Network
sampleBriefs.hook: Agencies, oversight, declassified files, and the line between history and speculation.

formats.title: Podcast Episode Briefs
formats.label: Audio / interview / monologue format
formats.summary: Structured podcast outlines that turn answer pages, maps, and books into source-aware audio episodes.

sampleBriefs.title: What Is The Deep State?
sampleBriefs.hook: Permanent institutions, contractors, agencies, and policy networks: what the phrase can mean without abusing it.

sampleBriefs.title: False Flags And Evidence Discipline
sampleBriefs.hook: The term is powerful, dangerous, and often misused. This episode separates concept from claim.

sampleBriefs.title: Bilderberg, WEF, And Elite Access
sampleBriefs.hook: Influence is not the same as control. Attendance is not guilt. But access still matters.

formats.title: Article Expansion Briefs
formats.label: SEO article / AI-search page / archive essay
formats.summary: Article frameworks that expand source-bound archive pages into search-readable essays with clean claim labels.

sampleBriefs.title: What Is An Evidence Boundary?
sampleBriefs.hook: The difference between what a source proves and what a reader infers.

sampleBriefs.title: What Is BlackRock?
sampleBriefs.hook: Asset management, ownership exposure, voting, advisory influence, and the difference between stake and control.

sampleBriefs.title: What Is CBDC Surveillance?
sampleBriefs.hook: Programmable money, digital ID, compliance, and the evidence boundary around future-control claims.

formats.title: Newsletter Signal Briefs
formats.label: Email / weekly signal format
formats.summary: Recurring signal briefs that route readers from current bulletins into books, maps, source lanes, and trust pages.

sampleBriefs.title: Weekly Intelligence Signal
sampleBriefs.hook: A source-bound route through the latest Intel Desk bulletins and archive paths.

sampleBriefs.title: Human Cost Watch
sampleBriefs.hook: Human cost panels must be sourced, dated, and separated from fake counters.

sampleBriefs.title: Migration Signal
sampleBriefs.hook: Migration routes, crime overlap, policy pressure, and the danger of collapsing categories.

formats.title: Social Thread Briefs
formats.label: X / Threads / carousel format
formats.summary: Thread outlines that turn archive routes into evidence-aware public posts without overclaiming.

sampleBriefs.title: Association Is Not Guilt
sampleBriefs.hook: A thread on how to read names, photos, meetings, flights, and records without flattening categories.

sampleBriefs.title: Court Record Vs Claim
sampleBriefs.hook: Legal filings, allegations, evidence, judgments, pleas, and settlements are not the same thing.

sampleBriefs.title: Source Hierarchy
sampleBriefs.hook: A thread on why source type controls claim strength.
